steps.observed: future.result(timeout=scenario_timeout) with try/except TimeoutError. On timeout: logs error, creates error_observation with timeout message, emits 'warning' progress event, continues to next persona.

steps.observed: If all scenarios fail -> status='failed'. If some succeed -> status='completed' with partial_failure=True flag.

frictions.description: Cannot trigger a real terminal failure via the live API because Nova Act SDK is not installed; the orchestrator gracefully falls back to mock provider. Terminal failure state testing relies on unit tests with CompleteFailStubBrowserProvider.
frictions.resolution: Verified terminal failure handling via unit tests (TestTerminalFailureStates) which use stubs that make both primary and fallback providers fail, plus code inspection of _handle_audit_failure().

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All 183 backend tests pass. Terminal failure handling (VAL-STAB-001/002) verified via code inspection and dedicated unit tests. Timeout handling (VAL-STAB-003) verified via configurable per-scenario timeouts with graceful TimeoutError handling. Full test suite (VAL-STAB-004) passes with 183 tests green.
